info.title: Traigent MFA Contract (registered routes)
info.description: Documented Flask MFA routes registered in TraigentBackend/src/routes/mfa_routes.py. V1: minimal path + method declarations to satisfy the cross-repo conformance gate. Full request/response schemas are follow-up authoring work (Batch 3b). Codex review of Batch 3: response codes replaced with `default` until each handler is traced; this prevents the OpenAPI from contradicting actual handler returns.
